overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk from an urban sidewalk with brick apartment buildings, across a city street, and onto a sunny beachfront promenade lined with palm trees. The clip transitions from a narrow urban corridor to a wide-open coastal recreational area with pedestrians and beach amenities visible.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an urban sidewalk bordered by a brick apartment building on the left and a street with parked cars on the right. The camera moves steadily forward past a blue sports car and silver sedan, approaching a traffic light at the intersection ahead.

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at an intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to a wider road with views of a white hotel building on the right. As the walk continues toward the beach, the ocean becomes visible in the distance, and palm trees line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with palm trees and recreational area

skate park structures and ramps visible in the plaza area ahead
large amusement park ferris wheel visible in the distance on the right
blue recycling bins and trash cans along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on a wide, sunlit beachfront promenade with palm trees lining both sides of the walkway. The camera passes concrete benches, trash bins, and numerous pedestrians while approaching a skate park area. In the distance, a Ferris wheel and the ocean are visible, creating a lively coastal recreational atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a narrow urban corridor into a wide, sunlit beachfront promenade. It begins along a sidewalk bordered by a brick apartment building, moving steadily past parked cars toward a city intersection. As the camera crosses the street, the enclosed urban environment opens up to reveal a white hotel and the first glimpses of the distant ocean and palm trees. The scene then expands onto a bright coastal walkway lined with greenery, passing concrete benches and pedestrians while the atmosphere shifts to a lively recreational area. Finally, the camera approaches a skate park with a Ferris wheel and the open sea visible in the distance.
